caption:
Suno's training data just got exposed — not by a lawsuit, but a supply chain hack.

Source code reveals the AI music generator pulled audio from YouTube, Deezer, and podcasts. Record labels already have a case in court. This leak just handed them more ammunition.

#AIMusic #Suno #CopyrightLaw #AITrainingData #MusicIndustry

story.title: Hack reveals Suno scraped YouTube, Deezer, and podcasts for AI training
story.dek: A supply chain attack exposed source code showing the AI music generator harvested audio from multiple platforms. Record labels argue this violates the DMCA despite Suno's fair-use defense.
